_comment: Perf Phase 5 fixture: 6-subtask team-pipeline plan — steps 1-4 are independent, step 5 depends on 1+2, step 6 depends on 5. Every specialist artifact is longer than pipeline.MAX_UPSTREAM_CONTEXT_CHARS (12,000) so the upstream-context builder injects NOTHING in either execution mode, which is what makes per-step prompts — and therefore token spend — byte-identical between sequential and parallel runs. Replies are keyed by the TASK-N marker in each step description so concurrent arrival order cannot shuffle the reply-to-step assignment.
user_message: Plan the Meridian Atlas launch event end to end: venue, budget, press, risks, run-of-show, and an executive brief for Dana Okafor.
coordinator_system_prompt: You coordinate the Meridian Atlas launch team. Decompose work, delegate to specialists, and synthesise their outputs.

specialists.name: Specialist A
specialists.system_prompt: You are the team's venue logistics specialist. Be concrete and cite the fixture ledger.
